name: Sour Cream Jell-o d' Akron
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water.
2. Mix pineapple, sour cream, nuts, and cherries.
3. Add the mixture to the Jell-O.
4. Pour into an 8-inch square oiled pan.
5. Refrigerate for 2 hours or until set.
6. Cut into squares and serve topped with whipped cream.
